identificacion.title: Company Identification
identificacion.direccion: La Vega Industrial Estate, Plot 12, 30007 Murcia, Spain
identificacion.registro: Registered in the Mercantile Registry of Murcia, Volume 1234, Folio 56, Sheet MU-7890

objeto.title: Purpose
objeto.text: This website aims to provide information about the production, commercialization, and distribution services of fresh fruit offered by Fruit Service S.L.

propiedadIntelectual.title: Intellectual Property
propiedadIntelectual.text: All website content, including texts, images, logos, design, and source code, is protected by intellectual and industrial property rights and belongs to Fruit Service S.L. or authorized third parties.

responsabilidad.title: Liability
responsabilidad.text: Fruit Service S.L. shall not be held liable for misuse of website content or for any damages arising from access to or use of the published information.

responsable.title: Data Controller
responsable.text: Fruit Service S.L. is the controller responsible for processing personal data collected through this website.

finalidad.title: Purpose of Processing
items: Manage inquiries submitted through the contact form.

legitimacion.title: Legal Basis
legitimacion.text: The legal basis for data processing is the data subject's consent when submitting the form and the legitimate interest in responding to inquiries.

destinatarios.title: Recipients
destinatarios.text: Data will not be transferred to third parties except where required by law.

derechos.title: User Rights
derechos.text: Users may exercise their rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction of processing, and portability by contacting info@fruitservice.com.

conservacion.title: Data Retention
conservacion.text: Personal data will be retained for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which they were collected and to determine any potential legal liabilities.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This website uses its own and third-party cookies to improve the user browsing experience and perform statistical analysis.

queSon.title: What are cookies?
queSon.text: Cookies are small text files stored on the user's device when visiting a website. They allow information about the visit to be remembered in order to facilitate navigation and improve the user experience.

tipos.title: Types of cookies used
items: Technical cookies: necessary for the basic functioning of the website.
Analytical cookies: allow measurement and analysis of user behavior on the website.
Third-party cookies: managed by external services such as Google Analytics.

gestion.title: Cookie management
gestion.text: Users can configure their browser to allow, block, or delete cookies installed on their device. Disabling some cookies may affect the proper functioning of the website.
